excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Biopharmaceutical Development and Commercialization (internship in Greater Bay Area via PolyU-Zhongshan Technology and Innovation Research Institute) lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/12063 Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: Students will conduct an internship in the Greater Bay Area via PolyU-Zhongshan Technology and Innovation Research Institute.
